text:
In the 2003 anime canon, when the State Military invaded Rose Thomas' hometown of Reole she was protecting children from the military. Soldiers found their hiding place, and then threatened, harmed and abducted her. They took her to a military base where she was raped, leading to her pregnancy. She gave birth to a baby some time before we see her again in the episode The Scar but it is unknown what the baby's name and gender is, though it is presumed to be a boy.

He first appears near the end of the series as a newborn wrapped in a blue blanket that is always carried in Rose or Lyra's arms, usually seen sleeping or crying. Interestingly, his moods seem indicative of others' morality as he laughs or sleeps when held by his mother or with Edward but cries around Wrath. This crying notably causes the Homunculi to become distressed. When it is revealed that Lyra is really Dante, she takes the baby and uses a circle on its stomach to open The Gate, and later threatens to kill him by "feeding" him to an alchemically created rock-dragon monster. However, he is saved by Edward Elric and returned to Rose's arms. 

The last episode shows Rose's baby a few months older in the Elrics' hometown of Resembool (possibly just coming for a visit). He is shown to be able to laugh and hold a bottle by himself.

Rose's son is shown again in Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa. He is about two or three years old and back in Reole. When the Thule Society's suits of armor invade, Rose rushes to his rescue and holds him close. It is shown that she has two other children now: a little girl and another little boy, both about the same age as her son. It is unknown where they came from, but that they seem to live with Rose because the credits shows Rose at her house swinging the little girl around while the two boys play together. It is presumed that they were orphans that she adopted since they immediately ran to her when they were frightened.

Trivia

In the series, the boy’s eyes are shown to be brown, but in the movie they are a dark blue.
In the Chibi Party OVA, they are brown again.
